videoSnippet.title: No One REALLY Understands The French || Amin Tabatabaei vs Vasyl Ivanchuk || Reykjavik Open 2026
videoSnippet.description:

Tabatabaei, M. Amin (2700) - Ivanchuk, Vasyl (2624)
Reykjavik Open 2026 (Chess.com) [05] 2026.03.28
C02 French, advance, Euwe variation

1.e4 e6 2.d4 d5 3.e5 c5 4.c3 Nc6 5.Nf3 Bd7 6.Be2 Nge7 7.O-O Nf5 8.dxc5 Bxc5 9.b4 Bb6 10.Bd3 O-O 11.Re1 a6 12.a4 d4 13.Ba3 dxc3 14.a5 Bc7 15.b5 axb5 16.Bxf8 Kxf8 17.Nxc3 Bxa5 18.Bxf5 exf5 19.Qd6+ Qe7 20.Nxb5 Rd8 21.Red1 Bb6 22.Qxe7+ Kxe7 23.Nd6 Bc7 24.Nxb7 Rb8 25.Nd6 Rd8 26.Rac1 Bb8 27.h4 g6 28.Nxf7 Kxf7 29.Rxc6 Bxc6 30.Rxd8
